items.name_en: M13679 Blue Denim Cherry Blossom 🍒. This Venice backpack is from the Takashi Murakami Reproduction series, incorporating personalized cherry embroidery into the Monogram denim canvas, vividly interpreting the artist's colorful whimsy. Refined leather outlines the slender straps, and bright buckles accent the flap and exterior pocket. Dimensions: 24*7*26cm. (Excludes doll)

items.name_en: M14231 White Flower Cherry Blossom 🍒 (M46279). This Pochette Metis East West handbag is from the Takashi Murakami Reproduction series, dyeing the Monogram coated canvas in soft new-season tones that complement the artist's sweet cherry pattern. A glossy S-lock buckle brightens the overall design, and the compact structure features multiple compartments, making it an elegant choice for daily travel. Dimensions: 21.5*6*13.5cm. (Excludes doll)
items.name_cn: M14231 White Flower Cherry Blossom 🍒 (M46279). This Pochette Metis East West handbag is from the Takashi Murakami Reproduction series, dyeing the Monogram coated canvas in soft new-season tones that complement the artist's sweet cherry pattern. A glossy S-lock buckle brightens the overall design, and the compact structure features multiple compartments, making it an elegant choice for daily travel. Dimensions: 21.5*6*13.5cm. (Excludes doll)

items.name_en: M14239 White Cherry Blossom 🍒(M81911) This Wallet On Chain lvy bag continues the 2000s personality narrative, joyfully joining the x Takashi Murakami replica series. Monogram canvas subtly highlights the vivid colors of the cherry pattern, fully releasing the kawaii power in the mind of this Japanese artist. Leather shoulder strap and chain for shoulder carrying. Dimensions: 23.5*4.3*12cm. (Excludes doll)

items.name_en: Full packaging, upgraded version with original factory leather
items.name_cn:
Full packaging, upgraded version with original factory leather
Full name: Classic Flap 1112 Large Ball, Grainy Ball Pattern
Size: 15.5*25.5*6.5cm
Leather: Original Haas Large Ball Caviar interior, imported lambskin
Hardware: 24K plated, all steel hardware
The classic CF has an irresistible charm, serving as a mobile label of elegance wherever you go. The pure white exudes an elegant and gentle goddess vibe, paired with a gold buckle for exquisite luxury. It is truly a must-have entry-level luxury item~

items.name_en: Monogram Medium
items.name_cn:
Monogram Medium
Dior D-journey Handbag
Don't tell me you still don't know about this? It's gone viral, girls.
Dior has truly mastered the art of "effortless chic" this year.
I have to say the new D-journey is absolutely stunning.
The difficulty to buy is no less than the series; I'm exaggerating, haha.
A casual yet high-end street style, completely changing the previous sweet vibe.\>The key is its versatile shoulder strap; all three carrying methods look good.\>The large leather pull tab paired with the side pockets adds more personality.\>Decorated with a vintage metal Christian Dior logo, it's both decorative and practical.
Dimensions: 33×16×15cm

Dimensions: 33×16×15cm

items.name_en: Monogram Small
items.name_cn:
Monogram Small
Dior D-journey Handbag
Don't tell me you still don't know about this? It's gone viral, girls.
Dior has truly mastered the art of "effortless chic" this year.
I have to say the new D-journey is absolutely stunning.
The difficulty to buy is no less than the series; I'm exaggerating, haha.
A casual yet high-end street style, completely changing the previous sweet vibe.
The key is its versatile shoulder strap; all three carrying methods look good.
The large leather pull tab paired with the side pockets adds more personality.
Decorated with a vintage metal Christian Dior logo, it's both decorative and practical.
Dimensions: 25.5×14.5×14cm

items.name_en: This signature bucket bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, highlighting a soft silhouette and versatile design. Crafted from blue oblique print fabric and other materials, it features smooth calfskin details in matching tones and a vintage gold-finish metal 'christian dior paris' logo on the front.
items.name_cn:
This signature bucket bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, highlighting a soft silhouette and versatile design. Crafted from blue oblique print fabric and other materials, it features smooth calfskin details in matching tones and a vintage gold-finish metal 'christian dior paris' logo on the front.
A spacious compartment with a snap and buckle closure safely holds daily essentials, while a card slot adds a refined touch. The small size comes with a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap for easy carrying by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Size: 21x19x11cm (LxHxW)
Model 9961

specs.rawTitle:
This signature bucket bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, highlighting a soft silhouette and versatile design. Crafted from blue oblique print fabric and other materials, it features smooth calfskin details in matching tones and a vintage gold-finish metal 'christian dior paris' logo on the front.
A spacious compartment with a snap and buckle closure safely holds daily essentials, while a card slot adds a refined touch. The small size comes with a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap for easy carrying by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Size: 21x19x11cm (LxHxW)
Model 9961
